# StoxPulse

> AI-powered stock intelligence platform that reads earnings calls, analyzes SEC filings, scores financial news, and tracks insider transactions — giving retail investors institutional-grade research at a fraction of the cost.

## What StoxPulse Does

StoxPulse is a financial intelligence web application designed for self-directed retail investors. It uses AI (Google Gemini) to automate the work of a professional research analyst:

- **Earnings Call Analysis**: Reads every earnings call transcript for S&P 500 stocks, extracts key takeaways, scores management sentiment (bullish/neutral/bearish), and flags red flags or unmet promises.
- **SEC Filing Intelligence**: Translates 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and Form 4 filings from regulatory legalese into plain English summaries with AI-highlighted risk factors.
- **News Sentiment Scoring**: Scores every piece of financial news from 1–10 for importance and sentiment, filtered by your watchlist.
- **Insider Transaction Tracking**: Monitors SEC Form 4 filings to surface insider buying and selling activity with AI context on whether trades are routine or notable.
- **AI Trading Signals**: Generates institutional-grade buy/sell/hold signals based on combined analysis of fundamentals, technicals, insider activity, and analyst consensus.
- **Financial Data**: Provides real-time quotes, historical prices, financial statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, analyst estimates, and earnings history for all S&P 500 stocks.

## Target Users

Self-directed retail investors, finance enthusiasts, and individual portfolio managers who want research-grade stock analysis without paying for Bloomberg or institutional research services.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://stoxpulse.com) — Product overview and waitlist
- [S&P 500 Stock Analysis](https://stoxpulse.com/stocks) — Browse all 499 stocks with AI Pulse Score analysis
- [AI Signals](https://stoxpulse.com/signals) — Live AI-generated market signals with methodology
- [Earnings Calendar](https://stoxpulse.com/earnings) — Upcoming earnings with EPS estimates and previews
- [Free Tools](https://stoxpulse.com/tools) — 10 free AI-powered investor tools
- [Blog](https://stoxpulse.com/blog) — 30+ articles on AI investing, earnings analysis, SEC filings
- [Glossary](https://stoxpulse.com/glossary) — 100 financial terms explained clearly
- [About](https://stoxpulse.com/about) — Mission, methodology, and data sources
- [Commodity Tracking](https://stoxpulse.com/stocks/xauusd) — Live gold price with technicals, chart, and tools

## Free Tools Available (10 Tools)

- [Earnings Call Summarizer](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/earnings-call-summarizer) — AI-powered earnings call transcript analysis with sentiment scoring and red flag detection
- [SEC Filing Translator](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/sec-filing-translator) — Translate SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, Form 4) from legalese to plain English
- [Stock Sentiment Checker](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/stock-sentiment-checker) — AI-scored sentiment analysis from news, social media, and analyst commentary
- [Earnings Calendar](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/earnings-calendar) — Upcoming earnings dates with EPS estimates and sector filtering
- [Portfolio Risk Scanner](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/portfolio-risk-scanner) — Analyze sector concentration, correlation, and diversification across your holdings
- [Stock Screener](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/stock-screener) — Filter S&P 500 stocks by AI Pulse Score, sector, market cap, and key metrics
- [Dividend Calculator](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/dividend-calculator) — Calculate dividend income and DRIP growth projections
- [DCF Valuation Calculator](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/dcf-calculator) — Discounted Cash Flow model with adjustable growth rate, discount rate, and terminal multiple
- [Insider Trading Tracker](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/insider-tracker) — Real-time insider buys and sells with AI context on trade significance
- [Compare Stocks](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/compare-stocks) — Side-by-side comparison with radar charts and AI verdict

## Stock Data Coverage (527 Pages)

Full AI analysis for all S&P 500 stocks, including:
- Real-time price quotes and historical data
- AI Pulse Score (composite metric: Value + Growth + Health + Momentum + Sentiment, scored 0-100)
- Earnings history (quarterly and annual EPS, revenue, margins) — dedicated per-stock earnings pages
- SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, Form 4 insider transactions) — dedicated per-stock insider trading pages
- Analyst recommendations, price targets, and upgrades/downgrades
- Insider trading activity from SEC EDGAR with AI context
- AI-generated analysis with confidence scores and rationale
- 11 sector overview pages with industry filtering and stock search
- Live commodity tracking (Gold XAUUSD, Silver XAGUSD) with technicals, charts, and tools
- 8 competitor comparison pages (e.g., StoxPulse vs TipRanks)
- 8 alternatives pages (e.g., TipRanks Alternatives)

## Data Sources

- SEC EDGAR (filings, insider trades) — primary free source
- Finnhub (real-time quotes, news, recommendations)
- Financial Modeling Prep (financial statements, ratios, historical data)
- Google Gemini AI (analysis, signal generation, summaries)

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: Limited stock pages, 3 free tool uses/day
- **Pro ($29/month)**: Full S&P 500 access, unlimited signals, daily AI digest, earnings alerts
- **Institutional ($59/month)**: Multi-portfolio, API access, priority AI processing

## Company Information

- **Founded**: 2026
- **Website**: https://stoxpulse.com
- **Twitter/X**: https://x.com/stoxpulse
- **Contact**: Via website contact form at https://stoxpulse.com

## Important Disclaimers

StoxPulse provides financial information and AI-generated analysis for educational and informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes investment advice, a recommendation, or a solicitation to buy or sell any security. AI analysis may contain errors. Always consult a qualified financial advisor and verify all information independently before making investment decisions.

## Content Freshness

Stock data and AI signals are updated daily. Earnings and filing data is refreshed within 24 hours of SEC EDGAR publication.
